title: jasminum cuspidatum
intro: Jasminum cuspidatum, also known as the silvervine or matthioli, is a perennial vine native to East Asia, characterized by its silver-green leaves and white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of jasminum cuspidatum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in modern supplements, such as capsules and tablets, to support overall well-being.
